characters.description: An Arbitage professor and rune researcher who leads Moxie and Lee in dangerous hunts. He uses violin-driven formations, but needs his companions to defend him while the music takes shape.
characters.name: Noah Vines

characters.description: Noah's partner and fellow Arbitage magus, equally at home teaching and fighting beside him. After helping bring down a great snake monster, she claims the Earth Master Rune Earthen Muster.
characters.name: Moxie

characters.description: Noah and Moxie's demon companion, a formidable fighter whose body can assume unusual forms. She helps hold a great monster at bay while Noah prepares a musical formation.
characters.name: Lee

characters.description: A demon already connected to Noah's group and especially to Lee.
characters.name: Azel

characters.description: One of Noah's students, newly returned from demanding training with Silvertide. Expensive treatment has largely healed his injured neck, allowing him to join the class assessment on Windscorn Plateau.
characters.name: Todd

characters.description: One of Noah's students, visibly stronger after training with Silvertide and ready to join the class assessment on Windscorn Plateau.
characters.name: Isabel

characters.description: A Torrin heir and one of Noah's students. The upheaval following Evergreen's death weighs on the people around her as she prepares to resume training at Arbitage.
characters.name: Emily

characters.description: A former captive freed from Gentil's control who comes to Arbitage seeking Noah's instruction.
characters.name: Alexandra

characters.description: Revin's student, temporarily admitted to Noah's lesson at Emily's request. He accompanies the class to Windscorn Plateau for a practical assessment.
characters.name: James

characters.description: The Arbitage operator responsible for launching travelers through the transport cannon. His own runes are damaged, a problem Noah would like to repair without exposing closely guarded abilities.
characters.name: Tim

characters.description: A Linwick shapeshifter and Noah's former arranged fiancee. She returns to Arbitage carrying an urgent order from the Linwick family head for Noah to attend a meeting.
characters.name: Karina

characters.description: Evergreen's former aide, left without work or a home after her employer's death. She seeks shelter with Noah.
characters.name: Contessa

characters.description: An anonymous and apparently wealthy bidder at the noble auction. Through a representative, Number 14 asks Noah's masked group not to compete for Violet Transference and shows interest in an untested monster rune.
characters.name: Number 14

characters.description: The rank-six head of the Linwick family. He orders Karina to bring Noah to the family estate over artifacts taken from the catacombs, with assassins a possible consequence of refusal.
characters.name: Jalen

characters.description: A Linwick assassin sent by Jalen to target Noah under the Vermil identity. He watches Noah at Arbitage but declines a direct strike because he suspects a trap.
characters.name: Aiden

characters.description: A Linwick power broker who knows Wizen and has reasons of his own to oppose him. He offers Noah limited intelligence about the mind mage, but presents himself as a temporary source rather than a trusted ally.
characters.name: Father

characters.description: A Linwick mage whom Father promises to send in support of Noah's efforts against Wizen. His capabilities and the exact form of his assistance have not yet been shown.
characters.name: Brayden

characters.description: The hostile mage behind plant constructs that replace dead people and attack anyone who discovers them. He is holding Evergreen and intends to use her runes in the creation of a stronger form.
characters.name: Wizen

characters.description: A deceased Torrin figure whose former aide is left without work or shelter. Moxie asks that Emily not be told about the control Evergreen once exercised over her.
characters.name: Evergreen

characters.description: A powerful rank-five ally known to Noah's group from earlier events.
characters.name: Silvertide

characters.description: An advanced-track teacher and puppet user who arranged Noah's combat test with a remotely controlled swordsman. After he passes, she offers access to further knowledge if he joins the program.
characters.name: Ulya

characters.description: An advanced-track faculty tester who makes Alexandra's admission depend on a private fight. His domain suppresses her magic and lets ordinary physical attacks pass through him.
characters.name: Gero

characters.description: An advanced-track researcher and imbuer who questions whether Moxie belongs after the loss of her runes. He insists on testing the matter through a fight to exhaustion.
characters.name: Will

characters.description: The senior host of the advanced track's underground welcome gathering. He receives the newcomers while Noah privately detects the alarming absence of a heartbeat.
characters.name: Godric

characters.description: A white-haired advanced-track professor whom Silvertide secretly identifies as the hostile puppet hidden at the gathering. He keeps the discovery quiet so the controlling enemy will not know the deception has failed.
characters.name: Mayreena

characters.description: A rank-five Inquisitor seeking vengeance for two slain subordinates. Using regulated blood magic and a rosary made from demon bones, he establishes a trail toward the demon responsible.
characters.name: Raphael

characters.description: A deity linked to the red-horned cat avatar. She discovers that alterations to its runes have broken her practical control, prompting a new interest in the mortal responsible.
characters.name: Renewal

characters.description: A deity associated with Garina and the severing of power. Decras visits Renewal and compensates her for an earlier shared loss.
characters.name: Decras

characters.description: A red-horned catlike companion that appears without explanation in Noah's room. It calmly bonds with Contessa, who accepts responsibility for its care as part of her new arrangement with Noah.
characters.name: Mascot

characters.description: A powerful searcher pursuing a person sought by a god. She has distributed valuable runes among major cities as bait and attends the noble auction to watch for a response.
characters.name: Garina

characters.description: Garina's traveling companion in the search for a powerful target. He suspects their quarry may be deliberately avoiding the notice of major families.
characters.name: Ferdinand

characters.description: Vermil's masked mentor, presented as a powerful authority on the body-replacement threat. Spider tells Ulya that one clone is present at the advanced-track gathering and recommends leaving it hidden long enough to trace its controller.
characters.name: Spider

characters.description: An advanced-track professor assigned to collect Silvertide. Silvertide discovers that Peter has already been killed and that plant magic is controlling his body.
characters.name: Peter
